summary: Iteration 78 - REDD+ Homepage Updates and PDF Export Testing Complete. All backend APIs (11/11 tests passed) and frontend features verified successfully. Homepage REDD+ section with 4 cards, Features section with 9 cards, /guide-redd page with 5 categories and 21 practices, MRV Dashboard with PDF export button, and Cooperative dashboard MRV quick action all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Homepage REDD+ section visible with data-testid='redd-section' and 4 highlight cards (Agroforesterie, Zero-Deforestation, Gestion Sols, MRV & Tracabilite)
PASS: CTA button 'Decouvrir les 21 pratiques REDD+' present with data-testid='redd-section-cta'
PASS: Features section has 9 cards including 'REDD+ & Credits Carbone' and 'MRV & Rapports PDF'
PASS: /guide-redd page accessible after login with 5 categories, 21 practices, 60k FCFA/ha max, 10/10 score max
PASS: /guide-redd has 'Calculer ma prime' (data-testid='redd-cta-calculator') and 'Dashboard MRV' (data-testid='redd-cta-mrv') buttons
PASS: MRV Dashboard shows KPIs (Planteurs, Hectares, Arbres, Score Carbone, Score REDD+, ARS Or)
PASS: MRV Dashboard shows Adoption des Pratiques REDD+ progress bars and Distribution Niveaux REDD+
PASS: GET /api/redd/pdf/mrv-report returns 403 for unauthenticated requests
PASS: GET /api/redd/pdf/mrv-report returns valid PDF (Content-Type: application/pdf) for authenticated admin users
PASS: Cooperative dashboard has 'MRV REDD+ / Pratiques' quick action button (data-testid='quick-action-mrv-redd')
seed_data_creation: Test data exists in ars_farmer_data collection (1 farmer with REDD+ practices)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 78 verified all REDD+ homepage updates and PDF export features. Homepage has new REDDSection component with 4 highlight cards. Features section updated to 9 cards with REDD+ and MRV content. /guide-redd page shows 5 categories with 21 practices. MRV Dashboard at /cooperative/mrv has Export PDF button that downloads professional PDF report. Cooperative dashboard has MRV REDD+ quick action button. PDF endpoint requires Bearer token auth and returns 403 for unauthenticated requests.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent
